_comment: Deployment mapping for the Swivel 3rd-party ERP API (https://documents.swivelsoftware.com/3rd-erpapi.html). Used by erp-doc-api.ps1 when a draft HBL/HAWB is ISSUED. This file holds the NON-SECRET deployment codes (the bearer token lives in ops.config.json erpApi.token, gitignored). Every code here must match the corresponding ERP master (service type, status code, document type).
_partyGroupCode: Your Company Code - sent as partyGroupCode on every call (REQUIRED for real mode).
_serviceCodeDefault: serviceCode is REQUIRED by /booking/update and must match the Service Type Master in the ERP (e.g. CY/CY). Empty = issue is blocked with a clear error until configured.
_commodityFallback: commodity is REQUIRED by /booking/update; used when the shipment snapshot and the agreed description are both empty.
_event: The event stamped via /event/update when the document is issued. status must match the Status Code master in the ERP - per ops, the Transport Bill Confirm event maps to 'transportBill'.
_documentTypeCode: ERP Document Type Code per doc type - used by /file/upload (attachment documentTypeCode) and /document/generate. The customer-agreed draft PDF is uploaded under this code; it MUST exist in the ERP Document Type master or /file/upload will reject it. Set to BL_REVIEW per ops (same code for HBL + HAWB).
_generateDocument: true = after saving data + event, also call /document/generate so the ERP produces the official house bill document.
_bookingUpdateMode: strict = an ERP rejection of /booking/update aborts the issue. best-effort = the rejection is logged in the document history and the issue continues with /file/upload + /event/update. Flipped back to strict 2026-06-15: the old payload-invariant 'Departure date not active yet, Invalid carrier code' rejection is gone (live /booking/update returns ok once partyGroupCode=DEV + bookingParty.forwarderPartyCode=owncode are sent and POL/POD/service/commodity are read-merged from the live booking), so a real rejection now surfaces as an error.
_bookingOverrides: Optional last-step overrides applied to the /booking/update payload. Key = API property name; value = 'field:<doc field code>' (agreed document box), 'sa:<shipment_alerts column>' (snapshot), or 'const:<literal>'. Example: { "freightTermsCode": "const:PP" }.
